base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of moblin_blue_variant — a character (minion) from 1986 legend of zelda. Blue Moblin — stronger variant. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Blue Moblin — stronger variant; shoots faster
